commands: vite add testnpm2 -D -w -- --no-audit && cat package.json packages/app/package.json packages/utils/package.json # should add package to workspace root
vite add @vite-plus-test/utils --workspace -- --no-audit && cat package.json packages/app/package.json packages/utils/package.json # should add @vite-plus-test/utils to workspace root
vite add testnpm2 test-vite-plus-install@1.0.0 --filter app -- --no-audit && cat package.json packages/app/package.json packages/utils/package.json # should add packages to packages/app
vite add @vite-plus-test/utils --workspace --filter app -- --no-audit && cat package.json packages/app/package.json packages/utils/package.json # should add @vite-plus-test/utils to packages/app

vite add testnpm2 test-vite-plus-install@1.0.0 --filter "*" -- --no-audit && cat package.json packages/app/package.json packages/utils/package.json # should add testnpm2 test-vite-plus-install to all packages except workspace root

vite add -E testnpm2 test-vite-plus-install@1.0.0 --filter "*" --workspace-root -- --no-audit && cat package.json packages/app/package.json packages/utils/package.json # should add testnpm2 test-vite-plus-install to all packages include workspace root

vite install test-vite-plus-package@1.0.0 --filter "*" --workspace-root -- --no-audit && cat package.json packages/app/package.json packages/utils/package.json # should install packages alias for add command
